Analysis - immune cells - microenvironment datasets

Immune cell annotation

Pernelle

2024-07-08

library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(ComplexHeatmap)

Preparation

In this section, we set the global settings of the analysis. We will store data there :

save_name = "IC"
out_dir = "."

We load the dataset :

sobj = readRDS(paste0(out_dir, "/../5_immune_extraction/","immune_sobj.rds"))
sobj
## An object of class Seurat 
## 17010 features across 2534 samples within 1 assay 
## Active assay: RNA (17010 features, 2000 variable features)
##  6 dimensional reductions calculated: RNA_pca, RNA_pca_47_tsne, RNA_pca_47_umap, harmony, harmony_47_umap, harmony_47_tsne

and sample information :

sample_info = readRDS(paste0(out_dir, "/../1_metadata/", "env_metadata_sample_info.rds"))
sample_info
##    project_name exp_date genotype  age condition  sample_identifier
## 1       2023_10 23_05_04     flfl P365       HLS  23_05_04_P365_HLS
## 2       2023_09 23_05_04     flfl P365      cNFs 23_05_04_P365_cNFs
## 3       2023_20 23_05_31     ctrl P365        HS   23_05_31_P365_HS
## 4       2023_26 23_06_15     ctrl P365        HS   23_06_15_P365_HS
## 5       2023_31 23_08_08     ctrl  P90        HS    23_08_08_P90_HS
## 6       2023_35 23_08_10     flfl  P90       HLS   23_08_10_P90_HLS
## 7       2023_33 23_08_10     flfl  P90      cNFs  23_08_10_P90_cNFs
## 8       2023_39 23_09_07     flfl P365       HLS  23_09_07_P365_HLS
## 9       2023_41 23_09_07     flfl P365      cNFs 23_09_07_P365_cNFs
## 10      2023_45 23_10_12     flfl  P90       HLS   23_10_12_P90_HLS
## 11      2023_43 23_10_12     flfl  P90      cNFs  23_10_12_P90_cNFs
## 12      2023_47 23_10_16     ctrl  P90        HS    23_10_16_P90_HS
##       sample_type   color
## 1   flfl_HLS_P365 #76EE00
## 2  flfl_cNFs_P365 #EE2C2C
## 3    ctrl_HS_P365 #912CEE
## 4    ctrl_HS_P365 #551A8B
## 5     ctrl_HS_P90 #EE7AE9
## 6    flfl_HLS_P90 #8EE5EE
## 7   flfl_cNFs_P90 #EE9A00
## 8   flfl_HLS_P365 #458B00
## 9  flfl_cNFs_P365 #8B1A1A
## 10   flfl_HLS_P90 #53868B
## 11  flfl_cNFs_P90 #8B5A00
## 12    ctrl_HS_P90 #8B4789

This is the projection of interest :

name2D = "harmony_47_umap"

We visualize clusters :

Seurat::DimPlot(sobj, reduction = name2D, label = TRUE, pt.size=0.1) +
  Seurat::NoAxes() +
  ggplot2::theme(aspect.ratio = 1)

We change the resolution of the dataset :

sobj = Seurat::FindClusters(sobj, resolution = 0.5)
## Modularity Optimizer version 1.3.0 by Ludo Waltman and Nees Jan van Eck
## 
## Number of nodes: 2534
## Number of edges: 95881
## 
## Running Louvain algorithm...
## Maximum modularity in 10 random starts: 0.9145
## Number of communities: 12
## Elapsed time: 0 seconds
Seurat::DimPlot(sobj, reduction = name2D, group.by ="seurat_clusters", label = TRUE, pt.size = 1, label.size = 15) +
  Seurat::NoAxes() +
  Seurat::NoLegend() +
  ggplot2::theme(aspect.ratio = 0.8)

IC_markers = list("T cells" = c("Cd3g", "Cd3d", "Cd3e", "Cd8a", "Cd4", "Foxd3"),
                  "Macrophages" = c("Mrc1", "Pf4", "Apoe","Gas6","Adgre1"),
                  "Dendritic cells" = c("Plbd1","Cd209a", "Mgl2","Cd74"),
                  "Mast cells" = c( "Kit"),
                  "Langerhans cells" = c("Mfge8","Cd207","H2-M2","Epcam","Pxdc1","Cd74"),
                  "NK cells" = c("Nkg7", "Klrk1", "Klri2", "Klrc2", "Klrb1c", "Ncr1", "Klrb1f"))

# Not found in slot data:
# "Neutrophils" = c("S100a8", "S100a9","Retnlg"))

length(IC_markers)
## [1] 6
color_markers_IC = aquarius::c30_palette[c(1:length(IC_markers))]
names(color_markers_IC) = names(IC_markers)

data.frame(IC_type = names(color_markers_IC),
           color = unlist(color_markers_IC)) %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot(., aes(x = IC_type, y = 0, fill = IC_type)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(pch = 21, size = 5) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = unlist(color_markers_IC), breaks = names(color_markers_IC)) +
  ggplot2::theme_classic() +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none",
                 axis.line = element_blank(),
                 axis.title = element_blank(),
                 axis.ticks = element_blank(),
                 axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                 axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 10))

sobj = aquarius::cell_annot_custom(sobj,
                                   newname = "IC_type",
                                   markers = IC_markers,
                                   use_negative = TRUE,
                                   add_score = TRUE,
                                   verbose = TRUE)

colnames(sobj@meta.data) = stringr::str_replace_all(string = colnames(sobj@meta.data),
                                                    pattern = " ",
                                                    replacement = "_")

sobj$IC_type = factor(sobj$IC_type, levels = names(IC_markers))

Seurat::DimPlot(sobj, group.by = "IC_type", 
                reduction = name2D,
                cols = color_markers_IC, na.value = "lightgray") +
  Seurat::NoAxes() +
  ggplot2::theme(aspect.ratio = 1,
                 plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

Cluster smoothing

IC_cluster_type = table(sobj$IC_type, sobj$seurat_clusters) %>%
  prop.table(., margin = 2) %>%
  apply(., 2, which.max)
cluster_type = setNames(nm = names(IC_cluster_type),
                        levels(sobj$IC_type)[IC_cluster_type])

sobj$IC_cluster_type = cluster_type[sobj$seurat_clusters]

New clusters

We visualize the clustering :

umap = Seurat::DimPlot(sobj, group.by = "IC_cluster_type", label = FALSE,
                       reduction = name2D, cols = color_markers_IC) +
  Seurat::NoAxes() + ggplot2::ggtitle("UMAP") +
  ggplot2::theme(aspect.ratio = 1,
                 plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

umap

and split by origin :

sobj$sample_type = factor(sobj$sample_type, levels = c("ctrl_HS_P90","flfl_HLS_P90","flfl_cNFs_P90","ctrl_HS_P365","flfl_HLS_P365","flfl_cNFs_P365"))

plot_list = aquarius::plot_split_dimred(sobj,
                                        reduction = name2D,
                                        split_by = "sample_type",
                                        group_by = "IC_cluster_type",
                                        main_pt_size = 0.1,
                                        split_color = setNames(sample_info$color,
                                                               nm = sample_info$project_name),
                                        group_color = color_markers_IC)

patchwork::wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 3) +
  patchwork::plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "right") &
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3), title = "Cluster"))

quantif = table(sobj$sample_type) %>%
  as.data.frame.table() %>%
  `colnames<-`(c("Sample", "nb_cells"))

plot_list = table(sobj$sample_type, sobj$IC_type) %>%
  as.data.frame.table() %>%
  `colnames<-`(c( "Sample", "Cell Type", "Number")) %>%
  aquarius::plot_barplot(.,
                         x = "Sample", y = "Number", fill = "Cell Type",
                         position = position_fill()) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = unlist(color_markers_IC),
                             breaks = names(color_markers_IC),
                             name = "Cell Type") +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.5),
                              labels = paste0(seq(0, 100, by = 50)," %"),
                              expand = ggplot2::expansion(add = c(0, 0.05))) +
  ggplot2::geom_label(data = quantif, inherit.aes = FALSE,
                      aes(x = .data$Sample, y = 1.05, label = .data$nb_cells),
                      label.size = 0, size = 8) +
  ggplot2::theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                 axis.line.x = element_line(colour = "lightgray"),
                 text = element_text(size = 15),
                 legend.position = "none")
plot_list

quantif = table(sobj$sample_type) %>%
  as.data.frame.table() %>%
  `colnames<-`(c("Sample", "nb_cells"))

plot_list = table(sobj$sample_type, sobj$IC_type) %>%
  as.data.frame.table() %>%
  `colnames<-`(c( "Sample", "Cell Type", "Number")) %>%
  aquarius::plot_barplot(.,
                         x = "Sample", y = "Number", fill = "Cell Type",
                         position = position_stack()) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = unlist(color_markers_IC),
                             breaks = names(color_markers_IC),
                             name = "Cell Type") +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1500, by = 200),
                              labels = paste0(seq(0, 1500, by = 200),""),
                              expand = ggplot2::expansion(add = c(0, 30))) +
  ggplot2::geom_label(data = quantif, inherit.aes = FALSE,
                      aes(x = .data$Sample, y = .data$nb_cells+20, label = .data$nb_cells),
                      label.size = 0, size = 8) +
  ggplot2::theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                 axis.line.x = element_line(colour = "lightgray"),
                 text = element_text(size = 15),
                 legend.position = "none")
plot_list

Save

We save the Seurat object :

saveRDS(sobj, file = paste0(out_dir, "/", save_name, "_sobj.rds"))
saveRDS(sample_info, file = paste0(out_dir, "/", save_name, "_sample_info.rds"))
